part_frame.note: CAD-native: axis = local X; rings X=0..15. X=0 base side (outer seats), X=15 adapter side (inner receives adapter). Holes through; anchored at the relevant seating face.

evidence.raw_value: downloaded THK STEP RU85CC0 (seal variant of RU85UUC0); measured OD120 W15, inner 8xM5(~Oe4.4) PCD65, outer 8xOe5.5 PCD105
evidence.notes: from THK_RU85CC0CADNO.zip (manual download -- Misumi's THK CAD passthrough 504'd). OD120/W15 confirmed; both bolt patterns confirmed vs locked spec (PCD65 inner, PCD105 outer).

evidence.raw_value: THK RU85UUC0 locked: bore55 OD120 W15; inner 8xM5 PCD65; outer 8xOe5.5 PCD105; ds77 Dh93
evidence.notes: page-confirmed d55/D120/B15 (out/ru85_specs.png). Seal suffix UU vs CC differs; mounting interface identical (task allows a validated different PN string).

provenance.discovered_by: Misumi page + manual THK CADENAS download
